last_episode_to_air.name: I'll Use My Memories from a Past Life to Make a Business Deal
last_episode_to_air.overview: Ageha comes up with a big plan to bring prosperity to the Kikunoi lands.

name: SHIROHIYO - Reincarnated as a Neglected Noble: Raising My Baby Brother with Memories from My Past Life
original_name: 白豚貴族ですが前世の記憶が生えたのでひよこな弟育てます
overview: Ageha Kikunoi was a spoiled 5-year-old before he suddenly recalled memories from a past life. Then, he loved to cook, sew, and sing above all else. In this world, Ageha and his younger brother, Regulus, try to navigate the Kikunoi house as corruption among the aristocracy deepens. They’ll need skills from Ageha’s past life, blessings of gods and elves, and magic spells to help them on their way!

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: An empire falling to ruin: The Kio Empire. Living in that empire, is an overweight 5-year-old abandoned by his parents, Prince Ageha. Ageha has memories from a previous life of him living as a Japanese man in another world. He then encounters his younger half-brother, Regulus. Ageha had a vision that Regulus will kill him in the future over inheritance, so Ageha sets out to raise him after Regulus's mother passed. Once the sparkling and fluffy-haired Regulus cozied up to Ageha, He turned into a doting older brother before he even realized! Enjoy a fantasy story of young brothers managing their kingdom, sometimes involving the gods, as they reform it step by step to bring a better land to the next generation!
